intermediate.title: Present Simple or Present Continuous
intermediate.content:
📌 Present Simple – Dùng khi nào?
1. Thói quen / hành động lặp lại thường xuyên:
I wash my hair every day. She never goes to the library. I don't drink coffee.
✦ Thường đi với: always, usually, often, sometimes, never, every day, once a week, twice a month...

2. Sự thật hiển nhiên, quy luật khoa học:
Water boils at 100°C. The sun rises in the east.

3. Trạng thái cố định / vĩnh viễn:
She has two brothers. I live in Ha Noi. He likes football.

4. Lịch trình, thời khóa biểu (tương lai cố định):
The train leaves at 8am tomorrow.
📌 Present Continuous – Dùng khi nào?
1. Hành động đang xảy ra ngay lúc nói:
I can't talk now. I'm brushing my teeth. She is talking on the phone.

2. Hành động tạm thời (không kéo dài mãi):
I'm going to work by bus this week because my car is at the garage.
I'm living with my cousins until I find a flat.
✦ Thường đi với: now, at the moment, this week/month, these days, currently, at present, nowadays...

3. Xu hướng đang thay đổi:
The climate is changing very quickly. More people are trying to eat healthily nowadays.

4. Kế hoạch tương lai đã được sắp xếp:
We're meeting them tomorrow evening. She's flying to London next week.

5. Thói quen gây khó chịu (với always):
He's always losing his keys! (= irritating habit)
⚠️ Stative Verbs – Động từ trạng thái KHÔNG dùng Continuous
Các động từ này diễn tả trạng thái chứ không phải hành động, do đó KHÔNG được dùng ở dạng -ing:

NhómĐộng từ
Cảm xúc / thái độlike, love, hate, prefer, want, wish, need
Nhận thức / suy nghĩknow, believe, think (= opinion), understand, remember, forget, realise
Giác quansee, hear, smell, taste, seem, appear
Sở hữuhave (= possess), own, belong, contain

❌ I am knowing the answer. → ✅ I know the answer.
❌ She is having two cats. → ✅ She has two cats.
❌ He is wanting a coffee. → ✅ He wants a coffee.

⚠️ Một số động từ có hai nghĩa:
• I think he is right. (= opinion → Simple) / I'm thinking about you. (= process → Continuous)
• She has a car. (= possess → Simple) / She's having lunch. (= action → Continuous)
📐 Bảng so sánh nhanh
Present SimplePresent Continuous
I work in a bank. (permanent)I'm working from home today. (temporary)
She drinks coffee every morning. (habit)She's drinking coffee now. (this moment)
He plays tennis on Sundays. (routine)He's playing tennis this afternoon. (arranged)
I usually walk to work, but today I'm taking the bus.Simple = thói quen | Continuous = tạm thời hôm nay
She is always borrowing my things without asking!always + Continuous = thói quen gây bực bội

exercises.q: She ___ to work by bus this week because her car is being repaired.
exercises.exp: Tình huống tạm thời trong tuần này → Present Continuous

exercises.q: Water ___ at 100 degrees Celsius.
exercises.exp: Sự thật khoa học → Present Simple

exercises.q: I ___ you can't come. That's a pity.
exercises.exp: understand = stative verb → Present Simple

exercises.q: Listen! Someone ___ in the next room.
exercises.exp: Đang xảy ra ngay lúc nói → Present Continuous

exercises.q: My sister ___ in London for a few months while she studies there.
exercises.exp: Tạm thời trong vài tháng → Present Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ always ___ his keys! It's so annoying.
exercises.exp: always + Continuous = thói quen gây bực bội

exercises.q: The train ___ at 7:30 tomorrow morning.
exercises.exp: Lịch trình cố định → Present Simple

exercises.q: ___ you enjoy the party last night? — Sorry, wrong tense. What does she ___ at weekends?
exercises.exp: Hỏi về thói quen cuối tuần → Present Simple

exercises.q: I ___ this book is really interesting.
exercises.exp: think = ý kiến → stative → Present Simple

exercises.q: More and more people ___ to eat healthily nowadays.
exercises.exp: Xu hướng đang thay đổi → Present Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ her hair every day.
exercises.exp: Thói quen hàng ngày → Present Simple

exercises.q: He ___ the sauce right now to check if it needs more salt.
exercises.exp: taste = hành động (thử nếm) → Continuous được dùng

exercises.q: We ___ John and Maria for dinner next Saturday.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch đã sắp xếp → Present Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ my parents every Sunday for lunch.
exercises.exp: Thói quen mỗi Chủ nhật → Present Simple

exercises.q: She ___ a shower at the moment – can she call you back?
exercises.exp: have a shower = hành động → Continuous được dùng

exercises.q: The population of the world ___ very fast.
exercises.exp: Xu hướng đang thay đổi → Present Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ two sisters and one brother.
exercises.exp: have = sở hữu → stative → Present Simple

exercises.q: He usually ___ to work, but today he ___ because it's raining.
exercises.exp: thói quen → Simple; tạm thời hôm nay → Continuous

exercises.q: What ___ you ___ this evening? Any plans?
exercises.exp: Hỏi về kế hoạch đã sắp xếp → Present Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ English at a language school – it's only for the summer.
exercises.exp: Tạm thời trong hè → Present Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (not/understand) why he ___ (behave) so strangely these days.
exercises.exp: understand = stative; behave these days = temporary → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (work) in a bank, but this month she ___ (do) a training course.
exercises.exp: permanent job → Simple; temporary this month → Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ (always/leave) the door open. It drives me crazy!
exercises.exp: always + Continuous = thói quen gây bực bội

exercises.q: They ___ (move) to a new house next month – everything is arranged.
exercises.exp: Kế hoạch tương lai đã sắp xếp → Continuous

exercises.q: The sun ___ (set) in the west. It's a natural fact.
exercises.exp: Quy luật tự nhiên → Present Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (think) about changing my job these days.
exercises.exp: think = đang cân nhắc (process) → Continuous

exercises.q: Look at that man! He ___ (try) to open the wrong car.
exercises.exp: Đang xảy ra ngay lúc nhìn → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (belong) to a yoga club and ___ (go) twice a week.
exercises.exp: belong = stative; go twice a week = thói quen → Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (not/like) horror films at all.
exercises.exp: like = stative → Present Simple

exercises.q: Your English ___ (improve) a lot lately!
exercises.exp: Xu hướng thay đổi → Present Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ (seem) upset about something. Do you know what happened?
exercises.exp: seem = stative → Present Simple

exercises.q: I usually ___ (cycle) to school, but today I ___ (walk) because my bike is broken.
exercises.exp: thói quen → Simple; hôm nay tạm thời → Continuous

exercises.q: What ___ she ___ (do) for a living? — She ___ (teach) at a primary school.
exercises.exp: Hỏi về nghề nghiệp cố định → Present Simple

exercises.q: We ___ (stay) at a hotel for now while our apartment is being renovated.
exercises.exp: Tạm thời → Present Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ (not/remember) where he ___ (put) his phone.
exercises.exp: remember = stative → Simple; put = past action → Past Simple

exercises.q: The company ___ (expand) rapidly at the moment.
exercises.exp: Xu hướng đang xảy ra → Present Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (have) lunch with her boss right now.
exercises.exp: have lunch = hành động → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (want) to speak to the manager, please.
exercises.exp: want = stative → Present Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (play) football every Saturday with his friends.
exercises.exp: Thói quen cuối tuần → Present Simple

exercises.q: She ___ (study) hard this week because her exams are next Monday.
exercises.exp: Tạm thời trong tuần này → Present Continuous

exercises.q: The bus ___ (leave) at 9:15, so don't be late.
exercises.exp: Lịch trình cố định → Present Simple

reorder.words: She is going to work by bus this week
I usually walk to school but today I am driving
He is always losing his keys and it is very annoying
Water boils at one hundred degrees Celsius
They are meeting John and Maria for dinner tomorrow
Your English is improving a lot these days
I am living with my cousins until I find a flat
She teaches at a primary school every day
The climate is changing very quickly nowadays
I think this book is really interesting
He is studying English at a language school this summer
She does not often eat hamburgers during the week
We are staying at a hotel while our apartment is renovated
The train leaves at seven thirty every morning
More and more people are trying to eat healthily nowadays
Look she is talking on the phone again
I do not understand why he is behaving so strangely
She has lunch with her boss right now
He usually gets up early but this week he is resting
The company is expanding rapidly at the moment

Mr. Green {{14}} not plan to retire from gardening any time soon.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả thói quen hàng ngày của bạn và điều gì đang khác đi trong tuần này so với bình thường
writing_prompts.example: I usually wake up at six thirty and take the bus to work. However, this week I am driving because the bus drivers are on strike. At work, I normally sit with my team, but this month I am sharing an office with a new colleague while our office is being repainted. Things feel different, but I am enjoying the change.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một người bạn thú vị – nghề nghiệp, thói quen và điều họ đang làm ở thời điểm hiện tại
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Simple for facts/habits, Present Continuous for current activities
writing_prompts.example: My friend Minh works as a software engineer and usually goes to the gym three times a week. He loves cooking and often tries new recipes at weekends. This year, he is taking an online course in machine learning because he wants to change his career direction. He is also learning Japanese these days and is improving very quickly.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một xu hướng đang thay đổi trong xã hội hoặc trong cuộc sống của bạn, và giải thích tại sao
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Continuous for trends, Present Simple for facts
writing_prompts.example: Nowadays, more and more people are working from home because technology makes it possible. Companies are changing their policies and employees are spending more time with their families. Online shopping is also growing rapidly, and fewer people are going to physical stores. I think this trend will continue because it suits modern life.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về sở thích cố định của bạn và một hoạt động mới bạn đang thử gần đây
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Simple for permanent preferences, Present Continuous for new activities
writing_prompts.example: I love reading and usually spend my evenings with a good book. I also enjoy hiking and go to the mountains at least once a month. However, these days I am experimenting with oil painting, which is something I have never tried before. I am finding it quite difficult but very relaxing. My painting is slowly getting better.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả thói quen gây bực bội của một người bạn quen biết và giải thích tại sao nó làm phiền bạn
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: always + Present Continuous for annoying habits, Present Simple for facts
writing_prompts.example: My flatmate is always leaving the kitchen in a mess after he cooks. He is also always forgetting to buy groceries even when I remind him. He never closes the windows when it rains, so the floor gets wet. It really drives me crazy because I value a clean and organised home. He is a great person overall, but these habits are very irritating.

intermediate.title: Past Simple or Present Perfect?
intermediate.content:
📌 Past Simple – Dùng khi nào?
1. Hành động hoàn thành tại một thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ:
We arrived yesterday. She graduated in 2020. I saw him last week.
✦ Tín hiệu: yesterday, last week/month/year, in 2010, ago, when I was a child, at 3pm...

2. Kể chuỗi sự kiện theo trình tự trong câu chuyện:
She opened the door, walked in, and sat down.

3. Hỏi về thời điểm cụ thể khi nào điều gì xảy ra:
When did you arrive? What time did she leave?

⚠️ KHÔNG dùng ago với Present Perfect:
❌ I've arrived two hours ago. → ✅ I arrived two hours ago.
📌 Present Perfect – Dùng khi nào?
1. Hành động quá khứ KHÔNG nhắc đến thời điểm (hoặc không quan trọng):
I've broken my arm. She's found a job. I've passed the exam.

2. Trải nghiệm trong đời (experiences):
He has been to the moon. I have never tried sushi. Have you ever lived abroad?
✦ Dùng với: ever, never, before, once, twice, three times...

3. Hành động vừa xảy ra gần đây, kết quả còn ảnh hưởng hiện tại:
She's just left. He has already finished. I haven't done it yet.
✦ Dùng với: just, already, yet, recently, lately

4. Trạng thái / hành động bắt đầu trong quá khứ, kéo dài đến hiện tại:
I've lived here for ten years. She's been my friend since 2015.
✦ Dùng với: for, since, how long, all day/morning, all my life, lately
🔄 Chuyển từ Present Perfect sang Past Simple khi hỏi chi tiết
Thường bắt đầu cuộc hội thoại bằng Present Perfect, sau đó hỏi chi tiết bằng Past Simple:
A: I've been to Japan.
B: Really? When did you go? What did you do there?
A: I went last summer. I visited Tokyo and Kyoto.
📐 So sánh: for và since + Perfect vs Simple
Present Perfect + for/sincePast Simple + for
He's lived in Hanoi for 5 years. (vẫn sống ở đó)He lived in Hanoi for 5 years. (không còn sống đó)
We've been married for 25 years. (vẫn kết hôn)We were married for 25 years. (đã ly hôn)
⚠️ have been vs have gone
• He has gone to Paris. = Anh ấy đã đến Paris (và vẫn còn ở đó)
• He has been to Paris. = Anh ấy đã từng đến Paris (và đã trở về)
I've seen that film – it was great! / When did you see it? – I saw it last Friday.Perfect để giới thiệu → Simple để kể chi tiết
She hasn't called me yet. / She didn't call me yesterday.yet → Perfect | yesterday → Simple

exercises.q: I ___ my keys. I can't find them anywhere.
exercises.exp: Kết quả còn ảnh hưởng hiện tại (chưa tìm thấy) → Present Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ in Paris for three years and then moved to London.
exercises.exp: Không còn ở Paris → Past Simple + for

exercises.q: Have you ever ___ sushi before?
exercises.exp: Trải nghiệm trong đời + ever → Present Perfect

exercises.q: When ___ you arrive in Ho Chi Minh City?
exercises.exp: Hỏi thời điểm cụ thể → Past Simple

exercises.q: I ___ already ___ my homework, so I can go out now.
exercises.exp: already = kết quả hiện tại → Present Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ to Japan twice in her life.
exercises.exp: Trải nghiệm + twice → Present Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ my best friend in 2015 at university.
exercises.exp: Thời điểm cụ thể (in 2015) → Past Simple

exercises.q: She ___ just ___ – you missed her by five minutes.
exercises.exp: just = vừa xảy ra → Present Perfect

exercises.q: We ___ married for 20 years. Then we got divorced.
exercises.exp: Đã kết thúc (then divorced) → Past Simple + for

exercises.q: I haven't spoken to him ___.
exercises.exp: yet chỉ đi với Present Perfect

exercises.q: This is the best film I ___ ever ___.
exercises.exp: superlative + ever → Present Perfect

exercises.q: He ___ to university in 2018 and graduated in 2022.
exercises.exp: Thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ → Past Simple

exercises.q: I ___ in this apartment since January.
exercises.exp: since = bắt đầu từ quá khứ, còn tiếp diễn → Present Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ the report yet – she's still working on it.
exercises.exp: yet trong câu phủ định → Present Perfect

exercises.q: ___ you ever lived abroad?
exercises.exp: Hỏi trải nghiệm đời người + ever → Present Perfect

exercises.q: I saw him ___ weeks ago.
exercises.exp: ago chỉ đi với Past Simple

exercises.q: He has ___ to London – he'll be back next week.
exercises.exp: have gone = đến và vẫn ở đó

exercises.q: She ___ recently received a promotion at work.
exercises.exp: recently = gần đây → Present Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ three cups of coffee this morning.
exercises.exp: this morning (chưa kết thúc) → Present Perfect

exercises.q: They ___ a lovely holiday last summer.
exercises.exp: last summer = thời điểm cụ thể đã qua → Past Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (never/eat) durian. Have you tried it?
exercises.exp: Trải nghiệm chưa có + never → Present Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ (leave) the office at 5pm yesterday.
exercises.exp: Thời điểm cụ thể (yesterday, 5pm) → Past Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (work) here since 2019 and he loves his job.
exercises.exp: since + còn làm → Present Perfect

exercises.q: ___ you ___ (finish) the report yet?
exercises.exp: yet trong câu hỏi → Present Perfect

exercises.q: We ___ (meet) in 2017 at a conference in Hanoi.
exercises.exp: in 2017 = thời điểm cụ thể → Past Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (already/book) the tickets – don't worry.
exercises.exp: already = đã làm trước → Present Perfect

exercises.q: This is the most exciting match I ___ (ever/see).
exercises.exp: superlative + ever → Present Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ (live) in that house for thirty years before she moved.
exercises.exp: Đã kết thúc (before she moved) → Past Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (not/see) Tom lately. Is he okay?
exercises.exp: lately → Present Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ (just/arrive) home from the airport.
exercises.exp: just → Present Perfect

exercises.q: He ___ (study) medicine for six years before becoming a doctor.
exercises.exp: Giai đoạn đã kết thúc → Past Simple

exercises.q: How long ___ you ___ (know) each other?
exercises.exp: how long + còn quen biết đến giờ → Present Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ (see) that film last Friday with my girlfriend.
exercises.exp: last Friday = thời điểm cụ thể → Past Simple

exercises.q: They ___ (be) married for 25 years. They still love each other.
exercises.exp: vẫn còn kết hôn → Present Perfect

exercises.q: ___ she ___ (send) you the documents yet?
exercises.exp: yet trong câu hỏi → Present Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ (break) my leg twice in my life.
exercises.exp: Trải nghiệm đã có + twice → Present Perfect

exercises.q: The company ___ (open) its first store in 2005.
exercises.exp: in 2005 = thời điểm cụ thể → Past Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (not/reply) to my email yet, which is strange.
exercises.exp: yet + kỳ vọng sẽ nhận → Present Perfect

exercises.q: She ___ (win) three awards since she started her career.
exercises.exp: since + đến hiện tại → Present Perfect

exercises.q: I ___ (grow up) in a small town in the countryside.
exercises.exp: Giai đoạn đã qua → Past Simple

exercises.q: We ___ (not/visit) our grandparents for months.
exercises.exp: for months, kéo dài đến hiện tại → Present Perfect

reorder.words: I have lost my keys and I cannot find them
She lived in Paris for three years and then moved to London
Have you ever tried Japanese food before
I have already finished my homework so I can go out
She has just left and you missed her by five minutes
He has been to Japan twice in his life
This is the best meal I have ever had
I met my best friend in 2015 at university
She has not finished the report yet and she is still working
I have lived in this apartment since January
He went to university in 2018 and graduated in 2022
Have they sent you the documents yet
She has won three awards since she started her career
They have been married for twenty five years
I saw that film last Friday with my girlfriend
How long have you known each other
He has gone to London and will be back next week
We have not visited our grandparents for three months
She broke her arm two years ago when she fell off a bike
I have had three cups of coffee this morning

passage.text: My colleague Anna is a very experienced journalist. She {{1}} in the industry for over fifteen years and {{2}} many countries to report on important stories. Last year, she {{3}} an award for her coverage of a humanitarian crisis. She {{4}} to Syria, Iraq, and Afghanistan during her career. When I {{5}} her last week, she {{6}} me about her most memorable assignment. She {{7}} that she {{8}} never {{9}} anything as challenging as what she witnessed in 2019. Since then, she {{10}} her reporting style and {{11}} more on human stories. She {{12}} her latest article three days ago.

Tom {{1}} cooking five years ago after he {{2}} an Italian restaurant and {{3}} in love with the food. Since then, he {{4}} dozens of recipes and {{5}} a popular food blog. Last month, he {{6}} a cooking competition on television and {{7}} third place. He {{8}} professional training at a culinary school in 2021. Recently, he {{9}} a book deal and {{10}} working on his first cookbook. His parents {{11}} always {{12}} his passion for food, and they {{13}} very proud when he appeared on TV.

The city of Hoi An {{1}} one of the most popular tourist destinations in Vietnam. Over the past decade, the number of visitors {{2}} dramatically. Last year alone, more than three million tourists {{3}} the ancient town. The local government {{4}} several measures to protect the heritage site since 2015. In 2018, they {{5}} a new law limiting the number of vehicles. Recently, they {{6}} also {{7}} a river clean-up campaign which {{8}} a great success. Many local families {{9}} their traditional trades for generations, and the town {{10}} its unique character. Visitors who {{11}} here in the past often say it {{12}} different before mass tourism {{13}}.

I {{1}} sport all my life. As a child, I {{2}} football every weekend with my brothers. When I {{3}} fifteen, I {{4}} a local athletics club and {{5}} running seriously. Since then, I {{6}} in over twenty marathons. Last year, I {{7}} my personal best time of three hours and twelve minutes. I {{8}} running in five different countries and {{9}} some incredible routes. Last month, my doctor {{10}} me to reduce my training because I {{11}} a minor knee injury. I {{12}} yet {{13}} fully, but I {{14}} to start preparing for the next race.

My aunt {{1}} a small coffee shop in 2010 with very little money. In the first year, she {{2}} very hard and {{3}} only a small profit. Since then, the business {{4}} significantly. She {{5}} the menu several times and {{6}} two new members of staff recently. Last week, a food magazine {{7}} about her shop and {{8}} it one of the best independent cafés in the city. She {{9}} the article yet because she {{10}} very busy, but her friends {{11}} her about it. It {{12}} the best news she {{13}} in a long time.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một trải nghiệm ấn tượng nhất trong cuộc đời bạn (dùng Present Perfect để giới thiệu, Past Simple để kể chi tiết)
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect for experience, Past Simple for specific details
writing_prompts.example: One of the most unforgettable experiences I have ever had was visiting Ha Long Bay. I went there three years ago with my university friends. When we arrived, the scenery was absolutely breathtaking. We spent two days on a boat, and I saw some of the most beautiful limestone islands I have ever seen in my life. I have never forgotten that trip.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một người nổi tiếng hoặc người bạn ngưỡng mộ – những gì họ đã đạt được trong sự nghiệp
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect for achievements linked to now, Past Simple for specific events
writing_prompts.example: Malala Yousafzai is someone I deeply admire. She has dedicated her life to promoting girls' education around the world. In 2012, she was shot by the Taliban for speaking out. She survived and has continued her campaign ever since. She won the Nobel Peace Prize in 2014 and has inspired millions of people globally. Her story has changed the way the world sees education.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về thành phố hoặc đất nước bạn đang sống – những thay đổi đã diễn ra gần đây và một sự kiện đáng nhớ trong quá khứ
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect for recent changes, Past Simple for specific past events
writing_prompts.example: Ho Chi Minh City has changed dramatically over the past twenty years. The city has grown into one of the most dynamic urban centres in Southeast Asia. A new metro line has recently opened, which has improved public transport significantly. In 2015, the government announced a major urban development plan. Since then, dozens of new buildings have appeared across the city.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một kỹ năng hoặc sở thích bạn đã bắt đầu học – bắt đầu từ khi nào và bạn đã tiến bộ thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Simple for when started, Present Perfect for progress until now
writing_prompts.example: I started learning the guitar about three years ago after I heard a beautiful song on the radio. At first, it was very difficult and my fingers hurt all the time. Since then, I have practised every day and I have learned over fifty songs. I have even performed at two small events this year. The first time I played in front of people, I was incredibly nervous.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một lần bạn đến muộn hoặc bỏ lỡ điều gì đó quan trọng, và điều đó ảnh hưởng như thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Past Simple for sequence of events, Present Perfect for present result
writing_prompts.example: Two years ago, I missed an important job interview because I overslept. I had set my alarm for the wrong time and did not wake up until it was too late. By the time I arrived, they had already chosen another candidate. I was devastated. Since that day, I have never relied on a single alarm again. That experience has taught me to be much more careful with time.

intermediate.title: Present Perfect Simple and Continuous
intermediate.content:
📌 Present Perfect Simple – Cấu trúc & công dụng
Cấu trúc: S + have/has + V3 (past participle)

1. Hành động hoàn thành trong quá khứ, kết quả còn ảnh hưởng:
Look how nice my car looks. I've washed it. (= kết quả: xe sạch)
John has broken his leg. He's in hospital. (= kết quả: đang nằm viện)

2. Trải nghiệm đời người (thời điểm không quan trọng):
I have never tried bungee jumping. She has been to Australia twice.

3. Với stative verbs – PHẢI dùng Simple (không dùng Continuous):
We have had this car for years. (NOT: We've been having...)
I have known him for ages.

4. Nhấn mạnh số lần hoặc số lượng:
I have read five books this month. She has called me three times today.
📌 Present Perfect Continuous – Cấu trúc & công dụng
Cấu trúc: S + have/has been + V-ing

1. Hành động bắt đầu ở quá khứ, vẫn đang tiếp diễn hoặc vừa kết thúc:
I have been waiting for two hours! (= vẫn đang chờ, nhấn mạnh thời gian)
She has been studying all morning. (= vừa kết thúc, có dấu hiệu mệt mỏi)

2. Nhấn mạnh THỜI LƯỢNG hoặc QUÁ TRÌNH, không phải kết quả:
Sorry I'm sweaty. I've been running. (= quá trình vừa xảy ra)
I couldn't do the dishes. I've been working all day. (= quá trình kéo dài)

3. Nguyên nhân của trạng thái hiện tại:
Her eyes are red. She's been crying. (= khóc → mắt đỏ)
Why are you so tired? – I've been helping my mum move furniture.
🔄 So sánh Simple vs Continuous
Present Perfect SimplePresent Perfect Continuous
Nhấn mạnh kết quả hoàn thành
I've washed the car. (= xe sạch rồi)		Nhấn mạnh quá trình / thời gian
I've been washing the car. (= tôi đang/vừa rửa, tay bẩn)
Dùng với stative verbs: know, have, like...
I've known her for years.		Dùng với dynamic verbs: run, work, study...
I've been working here for 3 years.
Nhấn mạnh số lần / số lượng
She's called me three times.		Nhấn mạnh thời gian liên tục
She's been calling me all morning.

⚠️ Cả hai đều dùng được cho tình huống kéo dài từ quá khứ đến hiện tại, nhưng:
• Simple nhấn mạnh sự thật (I've worked here for years.)
• Continuous nhấn mạnh thời lượng (I've been working here for ten long years!)
Look how nice my car looks. I've washed it.Simple → nhấn mạnh kết quả: xe sạch
Sorry I'm so dirty. I've been painting the walls.Continuous → nhấn mạnh quá trình: đang sơn
I have been waiting for hours! Where were you?Continuous → nhấn mạnh thời gian chờ đợi kéo dài

exercises.q: Sorry I'm late. I ___ to find a parking space for an hour.
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh quá trình kéo dài → Present Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ this house since she was born. It's her whole life.
exercises.exp: own = stative → PHẢI dùng Simple

exercises.q: He's exhausted because he ___ all day without a break.
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh quá trình liên tục → Continuous

exercises.q: How many books ___ you ___ this year?
exercises.exp: Hỏi số lượng → Simple (how many = kết quả đếm được)

exercises.q: She looks pale. She ___ in the sun all day.
exercises.exp: Nguyên nhân của trạng thái hiện tại → Continuous

exercises.q: I can't do the dishes. I ___ all afternoon.
exercises.exp: Quá trình làm cả buổi → Continuous

exercises.q: We ___ this car for twelve years – it still runs perfectly.
exercises.exp: have = stative → PHẢI dùng Simple

exercises.q: He ___ three emails this morning and it's only nine o'clock.
exercises.exp: Số lượng cụ thể (three emails) → Simple

exercises.q: Your eyes are red. ___ you ___?
exercises.exp: Nguyên nhân của trạng thái mắt đỏ → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ here for years and I love the community.
exercises.opts: have lived / have been living,have been having,lived,am living
exercises.exp: Cả Simple và Continuous đều đúng với tình huống kéo dài

exercises.q: They ___ all morning – the house looks amazing now.
exercises.exp: Kết quả từ quá trình (mệt mỏi, bẩn) → Continuous

exercises.q: Look! She ___ the whole kitchen. It's spotless.
exercises.exp: Kết quả nhìn thấy được (spotless) → Simple

exercises.q: How long ___ you ___ for this company?
exercises.exp: how long + dynamic verb → Continuous nhấn mạnh thời gian

exercises.q: He ___ five kilometres this morning as part of his training.
exercises.exp: Số lượng cụ thể (five kilometres) → Simple

exercises.q: I'm so hungry! I ___ anything since breakfast.
exercises.opts: haven't eaten,haven't been eating,didn't eat,am not eating
exercises.exp: eat = có thể dùng Simple (thực tế chưa ăn gì)

exercises.q: She ___ piano since she was five years old.
exercises.opts: has been playing / has played,has been having,played,is playing
exercises.exp: Cả hai đúng; Continuous nhấn mạnh thời gian kéo dài

exercises.q: Why is the floor wet? Someone ___ the bathroom.
exercises.exp: Nguyên nhân sàn ướt → Continuous (quá trình)

exercises.q: I ___ this word three times but I still can't spell it correctly.
exercises.exp: Số lần cụ thể (three times) → Simple

exercises.q: We ___ to buy a house for two years but prices keep rising.
exercises.exp: Quá trình kéo dài chưa xong → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ her phone all morning. It's on silent now.
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh quá trình liên tục → Continuous

exercises.q: Why are your hands so dirty? — I ___ (fix) my bicycle.
exercises.exp: Nguyên nhân tay bẩn → quá trình → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (know) Tom for over ten years.
exercises.exp: know = stative → PHẢI dùng Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (study) for six hours and I'm exhausted.
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh thời gian kéo dài → Continuous

exercises.q: How many times ___ she ___ (call) you today?
exercises.exp: Đếm số lần → Simple

exercises.q: He ___ (run) every morning this week and feels great.
exercises.exp: Thói quen kéo dài trong tuần → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (write) my report. Here it is, all done!
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh kết quả hoàn thành → Simple

exercises.q: She ___ (teach) at this school since 2017.
exercises.exp: Cả hai đúng; Continuous nhấn mạnh hành động liên tục

exercises.q: He looks tired. He ___ (work) overtime all week.
exercises.exp: Nguyên nhân mệt mỏi → quá trình → Continuous

exercises.q: We ___ (not/decide) yet where to go for our holiday.
exercises.exp: Quyết định → stative-like → Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (wait) for the bus for forty minutes. Where is it?
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh thời gian chờ đợi → Continuous

exercises.q: They ___ (paint) the house and it looks great now.
exercises.exp: Kết quả nhìn thấy (looks great) → Simple

exercises.q: She ___ (read) that novel for a month and still hasn't finished.
exercises.exp: Quá trình chưa xong → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (not/sleep) well lately – I feel awful.
exercises.exp: Thói quen xấu kéo dài gần đây → Continuous

exercises.q: How long ___ she ___ (want) to become a doctor?
exercises.exp: want = stative → PHẢI dùng Simple

exercises.q: The children are filthy! They ___ (play) in the mud.
exercises.exp: Nguyên nhân bẩn → quá trình → Continuous

exercises.q: He ___ (complete) four projects this quarter – impressive!
exercises.exp: Số lượng cụ thể (four projects) → Simple

exercises.q: I ___ (try) to contact her all day but she's not answering.
exercises.exp: Quá trình cố gắng liên tục → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (live) in five different countries during her career.
exercises.exp: Số lần/địa điểm cụ thể → Simple

exercises.q: We ___ (argue) about this for hours – can we please stop?
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh quá trình tranh luận kéo dài → Continuous

exercises.q: I ___ (feel) unwell all week. I might see a doctor.
exercises.exp: Trạng thái kéo dài suốt tuần → Continuous

exercises.q: She ___ (already/finish) her assignment. It's on the desk.
exercises.exp: already + kết quả nhìn thấy → Simple

reorder.words: Sorry I am late I have been trying to find a parking space
She has owned this house since she was born
He is exhausted because he has been working all day
How many books have you read this year
Your eyes are red have you been crying
Look she has cleaned the whole kitchen and it is spotless
How long have you been working for this company
We have had this car for twelve years and it still runs well
I have been waiting for the bus for forty minutes
They have been painting the house all morning and look exhausted
She has written her report here it is all finished
Why are your hands so dirty have you been fixing your bike
I have not been sleeping well lately and I feel awful
He has run five kilometres this morning as part of his training
She has been reading that novel for a month and has not finished
The children are filthy because they have been playing in the mud
I have been trying to contact her all day with no success
We have been arguing about this for hours please let us stop
He has completed four projects this quarter which is impressive
She has already finished her assignment and it is on the desk

But she keeps going. Her colleagues say she is the most dedicated person they {{8}} ever {{9}}. Lan {{10}} to become a doctor since she was a child, and that dream {{11}} her going all these years.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả lý do tại sao bạn trông mệt mỏi hoặc bẩn hoặc không thoải mái ngay lúc này – dùng Present Perfect Continuous để giải thích nguyên nhân
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Continuous for cause of current state
writing_prompts.example: I look exhausted right now because I have been working non-stop since six this morning. I have been preparing a presentation for my manager and I have been editing the same slides for four hours. I have also been answering emails all afternoon. My eyes hurt because I have been staring at a screen all day. That is why I am going to bed early tonight.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một dự án hoặc mục tiêu bạn đang thực hiện – bạn đã hoàn thành những gì và bạn còn đang tiếp tục làm gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Simple for completed parts, Continuous for ongoing process
writing_prompts.example: For the past three months, I have been working on a personal fitness goal. I have completed over forty workout sessions so far and have lost four kilograms. I have also improved my diet and have been cooking healthy meals every day. However, I still haven't reached my target weight. I have been making steady progress and I feel more energetic than before.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một kỹ năng hoặc thói quen bạn đã duy trì trong một thời gian dài – dùng cả hai dạng để so sánh kết quả và quá trình
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Simple vs Continuous to show result vs process
writing_prompts.example: I have been playing the violin for eight years and I have made enormous progress. I have performed in over twenty concerts and have learned more than sixty pieces. Recently, I have been practising a very difficult concerto. I have spent hours on one particular passage. As a result of all this practice, I have developed much better technique. Playing music has been one of the most rewarding experiences of my life.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một vấn đề đang diễn ra ở cộng đồng hoặc môi trường – những gì đã thay đổi và con người đang làm gì để giải quyết
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect for changes, Continuous for ongoing actions
writing_prompts.example: Pollution in our local river has become a serious problem. Factories have been releasing chemicals into the water for years, and the fish population has declined dramatically. Local volunteers have been cleaning the riverbanks every weekend for the past year. They have already removed tonnes of waste. The government has promised to introduce stricter environmental laws, and scientists have been monitoring water quality closely.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một người bạn đang theo dõi tiến trình – họ đã đạt được gì và họ đang phấn đấu thế nào để đạt mục tiêu
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Present Perfect Simple for achievements, Continuous for ongoing effort
writing_prompts.example: My cousin Minh has been training for a marathon for the past six months. He has already completed two half-marathons this year and has run over eight hundred kilometres in total. He has been following a strict diet and has been waking up at five every morning to train. He has not yet achieved his goal of running a full marathon, but he is getting very close. He has set his mind on finishing before the end of the year.
